title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: GRANTS PASS AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Habitat for Humanity provides an opportunity for families to build and buy their own homes. The houses are sold at no profit to homeowner families. Mortgage payments go into a revolving fund that is used to build more houses. Homeowner families and volunteers provide most of the labor, and individual and corporate donors provide money and materials to build Habitat houses. 409 NE E Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Households currently living in substandard housing who meet all of the following requirements: -Meet income guidelines -Can commit to 150 hours of sweat equity per adult over 18 years of age, with a family maximum of 500 hours -Are United States citizens or permanent residents -Have not have owned a home in the past 3 years -Have the ability to pay a mortgage payment (steady income and decent credit history) -Have the ability to be responsible for maintenance and repairs on a new home after move in -Have the ability to complete financial counseling and household maintenance education -Must live in Josephine County and be willing to live in Grants Pass Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon. Closed federal holidays. Email (541) 474-2884 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 474-2884 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to check for application openings or to sign up for application notification FEES: Monthly mortgage payment varies DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Josephine County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Domino's Pizza Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - CARS FOR HOMES PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - RAMP PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GRANTS PASS AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY
